title: Metabolomics and neuroanatomical evaluation of post-mortem changes in the hippocampus.
author: Gonzalez-Riano C Tapia-Gonzalez S Garcia A Munoz A DeFelipe J Barbas C
content: S-EPMC5541081 PMC5541081 Metabolomics and neuroanatomical evaluation of post-mortem changes in the hippocampus.
